purpose: Registry of public sources used to discover, compare, and verify Florida liquor licenses offered for sale.

dedupeBy: source listing ID or canonical URL
rules.notes: Price alone is not a reliable unique identifier because the same license may be repriced or syndicated across multiple sites.

sources.name: BizBuySell
sources.automation: manual review only unless written permission or an authorized feed is obtained
sources.duplicateRisk: high; listings may also appear on BizQuest or a broker's own site

sources.name: BizQuest
sources.automation: manual review only unless written permission or an authorized feed is obtained
sources.duplicateRisk: high; often syndicates the same broker inventory shown elsewhere

sources.name: LiquorLicense.com
sources.automation: manual review only unless written permission or an authorized feed is obtained
sources.duplicateRisk: high; the same inventory may appear on LiquorLicenseMarketplace.com, BizBuySell, or BizQuest

sources.name: Liquor License Marketplace
sources.automation: manual review only unless written permission or an authorized feed is obtained
sources.duplicateRisk: very high; appears related to or overlapping with LiquorLicense.com inventory

sources.name: Liquor License Auctioneers
sources.automation: manual review only unless written permission or an authorized feed is obtained
sources.duplicateRisk: medium to high; advertised prices may include auction fees and may overlap broker inventory

sources.name: Florida Liquor License Sales
sources.automation: manual review only unless written permission or an authorized feed is obtained

sources.name: BusinessesForSale.com
sources.automation: manual review only unless written permission or an authorized feed is obtained

sources.name: FloridaLiquorLicenses.com / Florida Business Investments
sources.category: Florida liquor-license broker and inquiry site
sources.duplicateRisk: unknown; inventory may not be publicly itemized

sources.name: Liquor License FL
sources.category: Florida liquor-license broker and availability monitor
sources.duplicateRisk: high; broker listings may also be syndicated to BizBuySell and BizQuest

sources.name: Florida DBPR Division of Alcoholic Beverages and Tobacco - Research License Data
sources.status: verification source; not a sale marketplace
sources.automation: official public data may be used subject to DBPR terms and file disclaimers
sources.duplicateRisk: none for license records; use to verify holder, status, series, county, and expiration

sources.name: Florida DBPR Division of Alcoholic Beverages and Tobacco - Public Records Downloads
sources.status: verification and market-research source; not a sale marketplace
sources.automation: official downloadable data may be used subject to DBPR terms and file disclaimers

sources.name: Google Search
sources.automation: manual search or compliant search API only
sources.duplicateRisk: very high; results often point to the same syndicated listing

sources.name: Bing Search
sources.automation: manual search or compliant search API only
sources.duplicateRisk: very high; results often point to the same syndicated listing

sources.name: FloridaLiquorLicenseMarket.com Seller Submissions
sources.duplicateRisk: medium; seller may also advertise through brokers or other marketplaces
